en_body:
Heap the steaming rice
upon a brimming plate
Lift the lily
white
In the tall antique bronze vase
Light incense
invite Nguyệt-Lão
to come
and tie the bow of love
binding our Lives
together fresh
Winter Season
wind welcomes
Tết arriving
Our private corner
shared
joins the glad festival
around the globe
note: Nguyệt-Lão is the old lunar matchmaker who binds destined lovers, and Tết is the Vietnamese Lunar New Year.
